note: Extended sanitizeHomePath (internal/agents/dryrun.go) to handle KEY=VALUE (unquoted env entries like ANTHROPIC_MODEL=~/me/...) and KEY="VALUE" (quoted flag assignments produced by fmt.Sprintf("key=%q", path) for codex -c args) by splitting at the first '=' and checking whether the value part is or starts with the home directory prefix.

Same fix as f_001 — the KEY=VALUE and KEY="VALUE" composite cases are now handled by the extended sanitizeHomePath, so ANTHROPIC_MODEL=~/me/... is recorded as ANTHROPIC_MODEL=~/... and model="~/me/..." is recorded as model="~/..." in both BuildACPWouldRun and BuildDryRunPlan output.

Added TestBuildDryRunPlan_HomePath (internal/agents/dryrun_test.go) covering both claude (WouldRun.Command and Env sanitization) and codex (WouldRun.Command and Args sanitization) paths through BuildDryRunPlan with home-path overrides and a home-path model spec. Also added composite-form cases (KEY=VALUE and KEY="VALUE") to the existing TestSanitizeHomePath table to directly validate the new scalar behavior. All tests pass.
